T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 149 

STDNT_HLTH_CARE_PRVDR_TXNMY_IND 

LABEL: Student Health Care Provider Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the student health care provider category; 
ever in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: STDNT_HLTH_CARE_PRVDR_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: STDNT_HLTH_CARE_PRVDR_TXNMY_IND
